title: SQLancer algebra.select' undefined 2
poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (a int, b int);
select 1 from t0 where (3 in (1, 2)) is null;
key_bug_features: Invalid use of 'is null' in select statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id int PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50), age int CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id int, description text, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 'First entry'), (2, 'Second entry'), (NULL, 'Null reference');
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE age IS NULL) IS NULL;
